title: Web Foundations
question: Which language is primarily used to structure content on a web page?
explanation: HTML defines the structure and meaning of web content. CSS handles presentation, while JavaScript adds behavior.

title: Styling the Page
question: Which CSS property changes the color of text?
explanation: The color property sets the foreground color of an element, which controls the color of its text.

title: JavaScript Basics
question: Which method converts a JSON string into a JavaScript value or object?
explanation: JSON.parse() reads a valid JSON string and returns the corresponding JavaScript value or object.
